Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.estimators.DualConicRobustEstimator

  • Packages that use DualConicRobustEstimator 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures

    • Uses of DualConicRobustEstimator in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Subclasses of DualConicRobustEstimator in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  LMedSDualConicRobustEstimator
      Finds the best dual conic for provided collection of 2D lines using LMedS algorithm.
      class  MSACDualConicRobustEstimator
      Finds the best dual conic for provided collection of 2D lines using MSAC algorithm.
      class  PROMedSDualConicRobustEstimator
      Finds the best conic for provided collection of 2D lines using PROMedS algorithm.
      class  PROSACDualConicRobustEstimator
      Finds the best dual conic for provided collection of 2D lines using PROSAC algorithm.
      class  RANSACDualConicRobustEstimator
      Finds the best dual conic for provided collection of 2D lines using RANSAC algorithm.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that return DualConicRobustEstimator 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create()
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and default estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Line2D> lines)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and lines and default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Line2D> lines, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and lines and default estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Line2D> lines, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provied listener and lines.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, java.util.List<Line2D> lines, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and lines.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Line2D> lines)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided lines and default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Line2D> lines, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided lines and default estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Line2D> lines, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator method based on 2D line samples and using provided lines and robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(java.util.List<Line2D> lines, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided lines and robust estimator method.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators with parameters of type DualConicRobustEstimator 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void DualConicRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateEnd​(DualConicRobustEstimator estimator)
      Called when estimation ends.
      void DualConicRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateNextIteration​(DualConicRobustEstimator estimator, int iteration)
      Called when estimator iterates to refine a possible solution.
      void DualConicRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateProgressChange​(DualConicRobustEstimator estimator, float progress)
      Called when estimation progress changes significantly.
      void DualConicRobustEstimatorListener.onEstimateStart​(DualConicRobustEstimator estimator)
      Called when estimation starts.
